name: Worcester

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: UMass Memorial Medical Center (University, Memorial and Hahnemann campuses)

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: academic medical center and teaching hospitals
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: The UMass Memorial Marlborough campus is NOT in Worcester. No named local medical corridor is established — the Plantation Street biotech cluster is research, not clinical. Never reference the long-closed Worcester City, Worcester County or Worcester State hospitals.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
